name: KHIANAT YANG TERPILIH
overview: Ali and Asmida were in love at university, but it didn't end in marriage. Now they are couples: Ali with Waheeda and their daughter Afeeya, who has a speech delay. After Ali is suspended from work for defamation, Waheeda sends Afeeya to a special education school—a place where fate brings Ali back together with Asmida, who is now a teacher there.
